skills.name: Electric Current
skills.description: Basic Attack is changed to AoE attack and the Attack Speed doubles.

skills.name: Overload
skills.description: Attack enemy under [Current] in front of you.

skills.name: Electric Orb
skills.description: Creates a Ball of Electricity in front.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %per 1 second
Targets: 3
Duration: 10 seconds

skills.name: Lightning Spear
skills.description: Throw an explosive Electric Spear in front.

skills.name: Electrode
skills.description: Give damage to the current target as much as the number of [Current] stacks applied to the target and a maximum of 10 enemies nearby the target.

skills.name: Static Field
skills.description: Apply a [Current: Activate] debuff that lasts for a certain period of time on the currently targeted enemy.(Ice Wall, Breaking Wheel, Shadow Monster excluded)
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 1 second
Targets: 3
Duration: 10 seconds

skills.name: Electric Drive
skills.description: [Spark] buff stacks for a certain period of time after casting.
skills.effect_text:
Duration: CaptionRatio seconds
Number of stacks: CaptionRatio2

attributes.name: Overload: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Overload] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Electric Orb: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Electric Orb] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Static Field: Enhance

attributes.name: Shock
attributes.description:
* Enemy with [Current] debuff staggers every 6 seconds

* Interval decreases by 0.2 seconds per 1 [Current] debuff stack

* Stagger is only applied once even if there are multiple [Current] debuff

attributes.name: [Arts] Electric Orb: Magnetic
attributes.description: * Ball of Electricity follows the target.

attributes.name: [Arts] Electric Drive: AoE
attributes.description:
* Number of Keraunos skill targets (except Electrode) increases as much as the number of stacks but [Spark] is not applied instead.

* Duration x2

* Cooldown 30 seconds
